"'''The Nebula Assassin'''" is a web adventure published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] for ''[[Tempest Feud]]''. It was written by [[Owen K.C. Stephens]] and published on [[March 7]], [[2002]].

==Publisher's summary==
''The Nebula Assassin'' is a mini-adventure for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' suitable for use during any era of play. The scenario, which is designed for four 10th-level heroes, takes place on the ''[[Lost Lady]]'', an old space barge that makes trips between the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] world of [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and its satellite [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] (also known as the Smuggler's Moon).

{{Website-stub}}
